transition_rules: A task whose packet requires standing Fable advice may append FABLE_ADVISORY while its top-level state remains DEV_VERIFIED.
Fable CHANGES_REQUIRED appends RETURNED -> IN_DEVELOPMENT -> DEV_VERIFIED under the same Sol owner; Fable PASS returns to DEV_VERIFIED and never grants approval authority.
DEV_VERIFIED -> OPUS_REVIEW -> CHANGES_REQUESTED -> IN_DEVELOPMENT -> DEV_VERIFIED uses the same Sol owner and a fresh Opus session for the next review.
DEV_VERIFIED -> OPUS_REVIEW -> OPUS_APPROVED -> PM_REVIEW -> ACCEPTED -> INTEGRATED.
PM RETURNED appends RETURNED -> IN_DEVELOPMENT -> DEV_VERIFIED, followed by a fresh Opus review before another PM acceptance decision.

required_values.review_cycle: non-negative integer; increments only when an Opus review cycle begins

submission_entry.extension_rule: Task-specific keys are allowed only when self-describing and must not replace the three required keys.

wave_r1_legacy_disposition.rule: Historical submission/advisory aliases remain truthful and immutable. Every new R2-or-later submission uses the canonical required keys and the advisories container.
